allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''Albums:'''', len\(d.get\(''''albums'''',{}\).get\(''''data'''',[]\)\)\); print\(''''Tracks:'''', len\(d.get\(''''tracks'''',{}\).get\(''''data'''',[]\)\)\); print\(''''Artists:'''', len\(d.get\(''''artists'''',{}\).get\(''''data'''',[]\)\)\); print\(\); a=d[''''albums''''][''''data''''][0]; print\(''''Sample album:'''', json.dumps\(a, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(g[''''id''''], g[''''name'''']\) for g in d[''''data''''][:15]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''Title:'''', d.get\(''''title''''\)\); print\(''''Release Date:'''', d.get\(''''release_date''''\)\); print\(''''Genre:'''', d.get\(''''genres'''',{}\).get\(''''data'''',[]\)\); print\(''''Tracks:'''', d.get\(''''nb_tracks''''\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''Name:'''', d.get\(''''name''''\)\); print\(''''picture_small:'''', d.get\(''''picture_small''''\)\); print\(''''picture_medium:'''', d.get\(''''picture_medium''''\)\); print\(''''picture_big:'''', d.get\(''''picture_big''''\)\)")
